task_completion.description: Verify the attendee CSV file is loaded as the data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a database exchange window, mail merge wizard, or data source panel showing 'attendees.csv' or its columns (First Name, Last Name, Organization) loaded in the word processor.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct label brand and type are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Labels setup dialog showing 'Avery Letter Size' selected as the brand and '5395 Name Badge Labels' selected as the type.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct fields are inserted on three separate lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the document showing field placeholders (e.g., <First Name>, <Last Name>, <Organization>) arranged vertically on three separate lines within the badge layout.

task_completion.description: Verify the text formatting matches the requirements (Centered, Bold names, Regular organization).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the formatting toolbar or the text itself: all three lines should be center-aligned. The First Name and Last Name fields should be Bold (and visibly larger), while the Organization field should be Regular (not bold) and smaller.

task_completion.description: Verify the final merged document is generated and saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a document containing actual attendee names (e.g., Sarah Chen, Michael Ross) populated in the badges, with the window title or save dialog showing the filename 'badges_merged.odt' in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the word processor GUI to create the badges.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with a word processor application (like LibreOffice Writer) rather than terminal commands or python scripts generating the .odt file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used mail merge/label features rather than manual typing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for field placeholders (like <First Name>), mail merge dialogs, or a 'Synchronize Labels' button, proving the agent didn't manually type out the 24 attendee names.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'cp', 'wget', or python scripts being executed to directly create or download 'badges_merged.odt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The data source is '/home/ga/Documents/attendees.csv' and the expected output is '/home/ga/Documents/badges_merged.odt'. The final merged document should contain 24 records. Look for these specific sample attendees in the final merged output to verify correctness: 'Sarah Chen' (BioTech Inc.), 'Michael Ross' (Pearson Legal), 'Jessica Wong' (City Planning), and 'David Miller' (StartUp Hub). Formatting must be: First Name (Bold, Centered), Last Name (Bold, Centered), Organization (Regular/Not Bold, Centered).
